data.title: All Bitcoin holders are in profit or broke-even, 0% in losses
data.description:
In a rare milestone, all Bitcoin (BTC) holders have reached profitability or at least broken even, as the asset maintains a price above $100,000. Specifically, Bitcoin’s ‘Holder Profit Share’ metric indicates that 97% of all holders are currently in profit, while 2% are at breakeven, leaving no investors in the red, according to latest data from crypto on-chain analytics platform IntoTheBlock, retrieved by Finbold on May 14. Bitcoin holders’ profit share data. Source: IntoTheBlock Adding further context, the ‘Holder Time Share’ data reveals that about 75% of Bitcoin holders have maintained their positions for over a year, 21% for 1 to 12 months, and just 4% for less than a month
source: https://finbold.com/all-bitcoin-holders-are-in-profit-or-broke-even-0-in-losses/

data.title: U.S. CFTC issued a statement: Commissioner Summer Mersinger will resign
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News The U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) issued a statement saying that Commissioner Summer Mersinger will resign. (Jinshi) 
Previously, the Blockchain Association announced that Summer Mersinger will take office as the agency's CEO on June 2, and May 30 will be her last day in office at the CFTC.

data.title: Telegram Shuts Down Channels Linked to Crypto Crime Market
data.description: According to PANews, Telegram has closed thousands of channels associated with the crypto crime market known as 'Xinbi Guarantee.' This platform, operational since 2022, has reportedly processed over $8.4 billion in suspicious transactions using Tether USDT. These activities include money laundering, fraud, and extortion. Xinbi Guarantee is registered in Colorado, USA, and is considered one of the largest crypto black market platforms on Telegram, alongside the Huione Group, which has been identified by the U.S. Treasury Department as a major money laundering concern.

data.title: CFTC Commissioner Summer Mersinger Announces Resignation
data.description: According to Odaily, the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) has announced that Commissioner Summer Mersinger will be stepping down from her position. The statement did not provide details on the reasons for her resignation or her future plans. Mersinger has been a part of the CFTC, contributing to its regulatory efforts in the commodities and futures markets. Her departure marks a significant change in the commission's leadership.

data.title: Bitcoin's Weekly MACD Histogram Signals Renewed Bullish Momentum
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Coindesk analyst Omkar Godbole has noted that Bitcoin's weekly MACD histogram has crossed the zero line, indicating a resurgence in bullish momentum. This bullish signal coincides with Bitcoin's rebound from the 50-week simple moving average (SMA), mirroring similar movements observed in mid-2024 and early 2023, which were followed by significant price increases.

The analyst highlighted that over the past five years, the MACD has entered the positive zone five times, with only one false signal occurring in March 2022, which led to a misjudgment of the market direction by bullish traders.

data.title: Analyst: Bitcoin weekly MACD trend indicates that bullish momentum is reinvigorated
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Analyst Omkar Godbole said that the weekly MACD histogram of Bitcoin has broken through the zero axis, indicating that bullish momentum has re-strengthened. The emergence of this bullish signal coincided with Bitcoin's rebound from the 50-week simple moving average (SMA), which is exactly the same as the trend in mid-2024 and early 2023-when BTC subsequently ushered in a sharp rise. Analysts said that in the past five years, MACD has entered the positive zone five times, and only one false signal appeared in March 2022 (circled in the figure), causing bulls to misjudge the market direction. (Coindesk)

data.title: Thailand’s Ministry of Finance plans to issue $150 million in digital investment tokens
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News - Thai Finance Minister Pichai Chunhavajira announced that the government plans to issue 5 billion baht (about 150 million US dollars) of digital investment tokens G-Token to raise public funds. The issuance is seen as a step to "test the waters" in the market and aims to explore the application of digital assets in public debt management. Chunhavajira said that investors can participate with smaller amounts and get returns higher than bank deposits. The plan has been approved by the cabinet, marking Thailand's further exploration in the field of digital finance. (CoinDesk)

data.title: French minister to meet crypto firms after kidnapping attempt
data.description:
The French interior minister reportedly plans to meet cryptocurrency professionals in the aftermath of a violent kidnapping attempt on the family of a crypto exchange executive in Paris. According to a May 14 France24 report, French interior minister Bruno Retailleau has invited crypto professionals to meet him after a brazen attempt to kidnap the daughter and grandson of Pierre Noizat, the co-founder and CEO of French crypto exchange Paymium. ”I will assemble businesspeople working in cryptocurrencies, and we have a few of those in France, at the interior ministry to work with them on their security,” Retailleau reportedly told the Europe 1/CNews broadcaster. On Tuesday, May 13, three masked men attacked Noizat’s daughter while she was walking in Paris’ 11th district with a man and her son
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/france-crypto-security-talks-kidnap-paymium?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: A certain whale address sold 197.1 WBTC in the past half hour in exchange for 20.444 million USDT
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain data analyst Yu Jin, a whale address sold 197.1 WBTC on the chain for 20.444 million USDT in the past half hour, with a selling price of 103,697 US dollars. The address withdrew 197.1 WBTC from OKX to the on-chain address half an hour ago, and then sold it for USDT and transferred it back to OKX.

data.title: JPMorgan’s Kinexys Connects With Public Blockchain on Ondo Chain Testnet Debut
data.description:
JPMorgan (JPM) took its first step onto a public blockchain network through its Kinexys Digital Payments platform, settling a tokenized U.S. Treasury transaction on Ondo Chain’s testnet.The pilot, detailed in a press release shared with CoinDesk, marks the debut of a Delivery versus Payment (DvP) transaction on the testnet, a new layer-1 blockchain designed to support institutional-grade real-world assets
source: https://www.coindesk.com/business/2025/05/14/jpmorgans-kinexys-connects-with-public-blockchain-on-ondo-chain-testnet-debut

data.title: CFTC Commissioner Mersinger exits to lead Blockchain Association as CEO
data.description:
One of the CFTC's chiefs, Summer Mersinger, is set to leave that agency and take on a new role — CEO of the Blockchain Association.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/354307/cftc-commissioner-mersinger-exits-to-lead-blockchain-association-as-ceo?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss
